articles.author: Scharon Harding
articles.title: Yearslong fight over users’ right to tweak smart TV software heads to trial - Ars Technica
articles.description: Access to TV OS's source code could allow users to limit ads, tracking.

articles.author: Bob Grant
articles.title: How Did We Miss the Asteroid That Will Narrowly Miss Us? - Nautilus | Science
articles.description: How Did We Miss the Asteroid That Will Narrowly Miss Us?: Space still harbors surprises aplenty, even with our rapidly evolving technologies
articles.content: An asteroid the size of a blue whale will pass within about 56,500 miles of Earth sometime this evening. That, by itself, is not terribly remarkable. Its close, for sure. About 24 percent the average… [+2139 chars]
